title: On paying attention as a creative practice
content:
Some thoughts on paying attention as a practice.

https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1505685296765-3a2736de412f?w=600

It's about showing up and noticing the small things.

title: A small system for getting unstuck
content: When I'm stuck, I use a simple three-step system.

title: Three places I return to when I need perspective
content: Sometimes you just need a change of scenery.

title: Making room for rough drafts
content: Not everything needs to be polished. Rough drafts are where the good stuff starts.
